channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The cost of the smart home is going up
item.description: Selling the smart home has been hard. Even Amazon has lost money in the space, despite putting hundreds of millions of Echo devices in people's homes. Google has also reportedly struggled to turn a profit from its substantial investment in Nest. But now Google is seeing dollar signs in the prospect of selling AI-driven subscriptions […]

item.title: Apple will broadcast a Major League Soccer game captured entirely with iPhones
item.description: Apple says the May 23 Los Angeles Galaxy vs. Houston Dynamo match is the first major live pro sports event to be shot only on iPhones.

item.title: I've found the 12 best early Memorial Day Apple deals to buy right now — AirPods, iPads, MacBooks, and more from $99
item.description: Memorial Day Apple deals are live, and I've found the 12 best early deals that I'd buy, including AirPods, iPads, MacBooks, smartwatches, and more.

item.title: Microsoft lance sa première distribution Linux pour ses serveurs cloud
item.description: Microsoft vient de dévoiler sa première distribution Linux disponible pour les clients de son service de cloud, Azure. Une initiative finalement pas si surprenante si on se réfère à son histoire récente.

item.title: Nvidia tells users to update GPU drivers now or face possible attack — here's what we know
item.description: More than a dozen Nvidia GPU flaws were fixed, including several high-severity ones.

item.title: Meta and Google get data from the app your boss uses to track you
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of workplaces use software to monitor employees. Now, a new study has found that many of these tools share data not just with employers, but with digital advertising platforms and data brokers as well. The review was led by Stephanie Nguyen, senior fellow at Columbia Law School's Center for Law and the […]

item.title: Xbox Game Pass : EA serait-il à l’origine de l’annulation de l’abonnement famille ?
item.description: Alors qu'elle était envisagée il y a quelques années, Microsoft a mis en pause indéfiniment le développement d'une formule famille pour son service d'abonnement Game Pass. Si on en croit la rumeur, l'éditeur EA aurait joué un grand rôle dans cette annulation.

item.title: GitHub faces a fight for its survival at Microsoft
item.description: When Microsoft announced it was acquiring GitHub in a $7.5 billion deal in 2018, developers were nervous. Some were concerned about Microsoft controlling GitHub, and others were taking a wait-and-see approach. Nearly eight years later, GitHub is now fighting for its survival, amid a surge of outages, security issues, and pressure from competitors. In the […]...

item.title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in a almost half century
item.description: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director says the modernized combat system has been upgraded to make varied tools flow better — 'We were inspired by early fan-made combo videos from the original'
item.description: Ubisoft was inspired by old fan-made Assassin's Creed Black Flag gameplay videos when it came to developing the modernized fighting system for Black Flag Resynced.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director says the team 'expanded' Edward Kenway's story and the theme of 'greed' in new content — 'I won't spoil too much of it for you, but we thought that that was a strong juxtaposition to who he is'
item.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director Paul Fu has confirmed that Ubisoft didn't alter Edward Kenway's original story in the upcoming remake, but did expand on the character with additional content.

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced perfectly captures the spirit of the original, but benefits from some much-needed upgrades
item.description: After three hours of sailing the high seas, firing cannons, stealthing through plantations, and giving it to baddies, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced is on course to be a brilliantly done remake.

item.title: 'I got chills': Dolby Atmos brought Audible books and Rocket Man to life in a way that whisked me to another time and place
item.description: Audible set up a downtown Manhattan space to celebrate its partnership with Dolby Atmos and all the books (and some of the music) the technology had helped them bring to life — and you can go listen, if you have an Audible account.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director reveals there is 'probably almost nothing' left of the original code in the remake — 'Almost everything had to be rebuilt'
item.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director Paul Fu has revealed that the remake of the 2013 game is built from the ground up and features very little of the original code.

item.title: Google won't rest until Gemini is everywhere in your home
item.description: The company is making it easier for manufacturers to make more Gemini-powered smart devices.

item.title: Summer is fast approaching, gamers — that means those leather chairs won't cut it, and it's exactly why I recommend this mesh office chair
item.description: Gaming during the summer heat in a leather chair can be a nightmare, which is why it's best to invest in an ergonomic mesh office chair as soon as possible.

item.title: Canva complète son tour des IA : après Claude et ChatGPT, c’est Gemini qui fait son entrée
item.description: Quatre assistants IA majeurs, quatre intégrations Canva en cinq mois. À ce rythme, la plateforme australienne sera bientôt intégrée à votre frigo.

item.title: Why the 2026 Hurricane Season Might Not Be That Bad
item.description: The impending arrival of El Niño will help keep the number of storms low. But it only takes one landfall to create a catastrophe.

item.title: Spotify is launching AI-generated remixes
item.description: Spotify and Universal Music Group (UMG) just announced a licensing deal that will allow users to prompt the creation of AI-generated remixes and covers for streaming songs. The tool will be a paid add-on for Premium subscribers. Artists will be able to opt out of the program, but those who do participate will collect royalties […]

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs objectifs photos pour smartphone en 2026 ?
item.description: La photographie sur téléphone a certes beaucoup évolué, mais reste toujours perfectible. Notre sélection d'objectifs pour smartphones vous permettra de ne jamais être pris au dépourvu.

item.title: I Cloned Myself With Gemini’s AI Avatar Tool. The Result Was Unnervingly Me
item.description: I used the Gemini app to generate lifelike videos featuring a digital clone of myself. Google sees this as the future of creation. I’m still creeped out.

item.title: Spotify is going to reserve concert tickets for ‘real fans’
item.description: As part of a new "Reserved" program, Spotify is going to start offering concert tickets for "real fans" of participating bands that are going on tour. The idea with the Reserved program is to give people an option to buy tickets without the hassle and stress that often comes with securing a spot for a […]

item.title: Spotify Studio’s AI agent creates a daily podcast just for you
item.description: Studio by Spotify Labs is a new standalone AI app that generates a daily briefing, podcasts, and playlists on your PC using chatbot prompts. The AI-generated content draws from your Spotify listening history, as well as info from apps you connect to it, like your email inbox, calendar, and notes. Spotify says its AI can […]

item.title: Spotify will now reserve concert tickets for artists' biggest fans — the service is standing against Ticketmaster battles and scalpers by launching its own ticket priority system so you can automatically benefit if you really love a musician
item.description: Spotify wants to take down ticket scalpers, and it's launching a new system that gives top fans the chance to score first-priority tickets.

item.title: Voici toutes les Peugeot à venir : de l’électrique, de l’hybride, et une belle surprise venue de Chine
item.description: Peugeot vient de présenter sa future gamme de 2030. Plusieurs voitures électriques sont prévues, et il y a une surprise : une grande berline sur base chinoise Dongfeng, qui a toutes les chances d'arriver en Europe.

item.title: It's official: Warhorse Studios is officially working on a new open-world Lord of the Rings RPG alongside 'a new Kingdom Come adventure'
item.description: Warhorse Studios has announced that its next projects are now in development, and they include a new Kingdom Come title and an open-world Lord of the Rings role-playing game.

item.title: Netflix's Avatar: The Last Airbender season 2 trailer shows plenty of live-action Toph
item.description: Season two arrives on June 25.

item.title: Meta's Oversight Board will examine deepfake video of a UK politician Facebook left online
item.description: The allegedly AI-generated video depicted the politician making incendiary statements about refugees.

item.title: AI video is moving beyond clip slop
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. Hollywood is cooked - or so a growing number of people on social media would like you to believe. Their purported proof: AI-generated clips of Daniel Craig riding a Vespa […]

item.title: Viture’s refurb Luma Pro smart glasses are more than half off at eBay
item.description: Price is a big barrier for most people who’d like to try out smart glasses for gaming, watching movies, or using their computers. Many models are at $400 and up, but you can snag a refurbished pair of Viture’s Luma Pro USB-C smart glasses for about $271 with the code LONGWEEKEND at eBay. Each set […]

item.title: Spotify's huge new podcast makeover means you can now ask in-depth questions about the episodes you’re listening to, which sounds great — but the new 'generated' Personal Podcast feature will be more controversial…
item.description: More new features are coming to Spotify's podcasts, including a search tool that dives deeper into your favorite episodes and a Personal Podcast generator.

item.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
item.description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets

item.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
item.description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

item.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
item.description: Spotify is releasing new audiobook plans later this year

item.title: Spotify will reserve tickets for top fans of an artists in a bid to drum up engagement
item.description: Spotify said that it will monitor activity like streams and shares to determine who is a top fan

item.title: 12 products for keeping cool at work
item.description: My strategy for productive working in 30°C+ heat

item.title: Aspiration XXL et séchage à 45 °C : le Roborock Qrevo S Pro nettoie tout à votre place pour 100 € de moins
item.description: Le Roborock Qrevo S Pro est un aspirateur laveur auto-nettoyant avec navigation intelligente à retrouver pour 489,99 euros au lieu de 589,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Redmagic 11S Pro+ : 4,4 millions de points sur AnTuTu, un record
item.description: Redmagic vient d'afficher 4 416 758 points sur AnTuTu V11 avec son 11S Pro+, soit le score le plus élevé jamais publié sur la plateforme. Sauf qu'on a vu la marque tricher sur un autre benchmark il y a six semaines.

item.title: Voici à quoi ressemblent les futures Fiat électriques abordables (Quattrolino, Pandina et Grizzly)
item.description: Stellantis a officialisé trois nouvelles Fiat électriques : la citadine Quattrolino, la citadine Pandina et le crossover Grizzly. Avec un cap sous les 15 000 € sur les plus petits formats, et un planning qui s'étire jusqu'en 2028.

item.title: PlayStation Plus Essential, Extra ou Premium : quelles sont les différences et quel abonnement choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Le service de jeu par abonnement de PlayStation a de solides arguments pour convaincre les possesseurs d'une PS5 et même d'un PS Portal de franchir le pas. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir sur la plateforme de Sony, les différentes formules d'abonnement, leurs avantages et leur prix.

item.title: The Ebola outbreak is ‘gaining momentum’ in Congo, warns aid groups
item.description: Ahead of the World Cup in North America, Congo’s soccer team canceled a farewell event for fans in Kinshasa, due of the outbreak. Healthcare workers and aid groups in eastern Congo said Thursday they are in dire need of more supplies and staff to respond to a growing Ebola outbreak linked to a rare virus, as armed groups continue to threaten a region already grappling with a displacement and humanitarian crisis.“The situation is worrying because this is gaining momentum,” Hama Amado, a field coordinator in the city of Bunia for the Alima aid group, told The Associated Press. “This is spreading...

item.title: Le Razer Blade 16 de 2026 a un sérieux problème
item.description: Razer vend son Blade 16 millésime 2026 plus cher que celui de 2025. Sauf que sur le banc d'essai de Hardware Canucks, la nouvelle machine est globalement plus lente, plus chaude sous charge CPU et embarque un bug d'autonomie au repos. Le passage d'AMD à Intel Panther Lake laisse un goût amer.

item.title: Top arcade game maker leaks nearly 19 million user records via WeChat mini app
item.description: Researchers found a new Elasticsearch instance containing plenty of sensitive data.

item.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani takes to Twitch to chat with New Yorkers
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch series today at 4 p.m. ET.

item.title: Samsung : la grève monstre de 48 000 salariés suspendue in extremis, mais l’histoire n’est pas finie
item.description: La grève de 48 000 salariés Samsung est suspendue après un accord in extremis sur les bonus IA. Mais le vote des membres et une contestation d'actionnaires pourraient tout relancer.

item.title: Stellantis vise les longs trajets : la conduite mains libres arrive sur autoroute
item.description: Stellantis a signé le même jour deux partenariats centrés sur la conduite automatisée, avec Wayve pour l'IA et Qualcomm pour le calcul. Les futures Peugeot, Citroën, Jeep et Fiat devraient devenir nettement plus reposantes sur les longs trajets autoroutiers. Rendez-vous fixé à 2028.

item.title: Garmin Varia : l’accessoire ultime pour votre sécurité à vélo est à -38 % sur Amazon
item.description: Pour pédaler l'esprit tranquille sans se ruiner, Amazon fait baisser le prix du Garmin Varia RTL515. Cet accessoire indispensable pour votre sécurité vous permet de voir et d'être vu à vélo en toutes circonstances. Habituellement proposé à 159 euros, ce radar connecté s'affiche aujourd'hui à seulement 123 euros.

item.title: I could probably generate hundreds of Gemini images before hitting the limit — but the new AI meter still changed my behavior
item.description: Gemini’s shift from daily limits to a new 5-hour window has changed the way I use it.

item.title: Le VPN préféré des cybercriminels a été démantelé, et ses utilisateurs ont été « identifiés »
item.description: Une vaste opération de police, menée par la France et les Pays-Bas, vient d'aboutir à la fermeture forcée de First VPN, un service massivement utilisé par les cybercriminels. Les serveurs du VPN ont été saisis, et tous les utilisateurs ont été identifiés par les forces de l'ordre.

item.title: Waymo pauses Atlanta service as its robotaxis keep driving into floods
item.description: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.

item.title: Cette console Lenovo est illégale et pourtant bien officielle, la marque confirme
item.description: Aperçue sur le site de vente en ligne AliExpress, la console portable Lenovo G02 contenant des milliers de ROM n'est pas une contrefaçon.

item.title: Mullvad to patch VPN fingerprinting issue to stop your activity from being tracked across servers
item.description: Following the discovery of an exit IP fingerprinting issue, Mullvad is testing a new IP assignment method that prevents third parties from tracking users across multiple servers.

item.title: Free et Free Mobile sont au point mort, on comprend pourquoi l’opérateur veut racheter SFR
item.description: Free n'arrive plus à recruter de nouveaux abonnés, que ce soit sur le fixe ou le mobile. L'opérateur ne semble pas trouver la recette gagnante face à Orange et Bouygues Telecom.

item.title: 18 content creator upgrades in Amazon's massive Memorial Day sale — and this gear is perfect for your home studio setup
item.description: If you're a photographer, filmmaker, or streamer, you won't want to miss these early Memorial Day deals.
